name: Flying Caped Superhero
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a brave superhero soaring through the sky with one fist punched forward, a long cape streaming out behind, a bold star emblem on the chest, a small eye mask, and a confident smile, a few puffy clouds around

name: Masked Superhero Hero Pose
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a strong superhero standing tall with hands on hips in a classic hero stance, a fitted costume with a chest emblem and belt, a cape draped behind the shoulders, an eye mask, looking proud and ready

name: Cute Superhero Toddler
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a round chubby little superhero toddler with big sparkly eyes, a short cape, a simple star on the chest, tiny boots, and arms raised high in a happy cheer, very simple bold shapes

name: Superhero Over the City
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a superhero crouched on the edge of a tall city rooftop at night, cape flowing to one side, looking out over a skyline of skyscrapers and a round moon, ready to leap into action

name: Super-Strong Superhero Lifting
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a muscular superhero lifting a giant boulder high overhead with both arms, feet planted firmly, a flowing cape and chest emblem, a strained determined smile showing great strength

name: Speedster Superhero Running
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a sleek speedster superhero dashing forward at full sprint, body leaning into the run, small motion swirls trailing behind the legs and arms, a lightning-bolt emblem on the chest, a fitted mask

name: Superhero Team Lineup
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a team of four friendly superheroes standing shoulder to shoulder in a confident row, each with a different cape, mask, and chest emblem, varied poses with crossed arms and hands on hips, all smiling

name: Super Pup Sidekick
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a cute cartoon puppy superhero sidekick wearing a tiny cape and a little eye mask, sitting upright with one paw lifted, a small star tag on its collar, big happy eyes and a wagging tail

name: Superhero Mask Close-Up
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a close-up of a superhero's face and shoulders, a detailed eye mask, a brave determined expression, wind-swept hair, the top of a high collar and cape clasp visible, simple background

name: Superhero to the Rescue
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a kind superhero gently rescuing a small kitten from a tree branch, one arm reaching out to cradle the cat, cape flowing, a friendly reassuring smile, leaves and a sturdy branch around them

name: Design Your Own Superhero
subject: characters/superhero
prompt: a superhero standing in a confident pose with a completely blank plain shield shape on the chest and a plain blank cape, ready for a child to draw their own emblem and patterns, simple bold outlines

name: Superhero Girl with Cape
subject: characters/superhero
